title: OD #1 — Narcan x2
description: Fentanyl overdose, unresponsive. EMS administered 2x Narcan. Transported to UK HealthCare ED. Refused further treatment, AMA discharge.

title: Detox Admission — FCMH
description: Self-admitted to Fayette County Medical detox program. 7-day stay. Referred to MAT program on discharge.

title: Depression Screening — PHQ-9 Score: 16
description: Initial mental health assessment. PHQ-9 score 16 (Moderately Severe Depression). Referred to behavioral health counseling. Not initiated due to waitlist.

title: Hepatitis C Diagnosis
description: Positive HCV antibody test. Genotype 1a confirmed. Liver enzymes elevated. Referred to hepatology, appointment scheduled for 6 weeks.

title: Eviction — Lost Housing
description: Evicted from rental property at 247 E 3rd St. Cited non-payment of rent. Entered homeless status. Applied to Lexington Rescue Mission, 45-day waitlist.

title: OD #2 — Narcan + Benzos
description: Fentanyl + benzodiazepine overdose. Found unresponsive under bridge. EMS administered Narcan x3 — slow reversal due to benzo involvement. Transported to FCMH. 2-day observation.

title: MAT Initiated — Suboxone 16mg
description: Buprenorphine/naloxone (Suboxone 16mg) initiated at BluegrassMAT clinic. Engaged with peer specialist Tanya Williams. Stable for first 6 weeks.

title: Entered Emergency Shelter
description: Admitted to Lexington Rescue Mission emergency shelter. Stable housing secured after 2-month wait. Case manager assigned.

title: MAT Discontinued — Patient Request
description: Marcus stopped Suboxone without taper. Cited side effects and desire to be 'completely clean.' Risk of relapse elevated significantly. Peer specialist notified.

title: Arrested — Possession Charge
description: Arrested on drug possession charge (Schedule I). Remanded to Fayette County Detention Center pending trial. Bond set at $5,000.

title: Mental Health Crisis — Incarcerated
description: Reported suicidal ideation to jail medical staff. Placed on mental health watch. Psychiatrist consult. Started on antidepressant.

title: OD #3 — Released from Custody (Day 1)
description: Overdosed less than 24 hours after release from FCDC. Fentanyl, significantly reduced tolerance post-incarceration. EMS + Narcan. Pattern consistent with incarceration release risk.

title: MAT Re-initiated — Suboxone 8mg
description: Re-enrolled in MAT program after post-release OD. Lower initial dose 8mg due to post-incarceration tolerance changes. Weekly check-ins scheduled.

title: Mental Health Follow-up — Stable
description: Follow-up psychiatric evaluation. Depression symptoms improved on medication. PHQ-9 score 9. Continued on antidepressant. No suicidal ideation reported.

title: MAT Stopped — Lost Insurance Coverage
description: Suboxone prescription lapsed when Medicaid coverage disrupted after address change. Unable to get prior auth in time. 3-week gap in coverage.

title: Re-Arrested — Violation of Probation
description: Arrested on probation violation. Remanded to FCDC for 45-day sentence.

title: Released from Custody — High Risk Window
description: Released from FCDC after 45-day sentence. No MAT bridge prescription provided at release. No naloxone kit. Returned to emergency shelter. HIGH RISK: post-incarceration OD window.

title: Elevated Liver Enzymes — Hep C Progression
description: Lab results: ALT 145 U/L (normal <56), AST 98 U/L. Liver disease progression concerning. Hep C treatment still not initiated. Hepatology referral renewed.

title: OD #4 — TODAY (Narcan administered)
description: Fentanyl + benzodiazepine overdose. Found unresponsive at Lexington Rescue Mission. Staff administered Narcan. EMS dispatched. Transported to UK HealthCare ED. DART assessment triggered.

title: OD #1
description: Fentanyl overdose at residence.

title: OD #2
description: Fentanyl + meth overdose.
